title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-initial-setup bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-initial-setup is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The gnome-initial-setup packages provide the Initial Setup application for GNOME, which allows for quick configuration of the operating system after installation.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Please check how users/groups are handled in gnome-initial-setup for Image Mode [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-82252)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for gnome-initial-setup is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The gnome-initial-setup packages provide the Initial Setup application for GNOME, which allows for quick configuration of the operating system after installation.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Please check how users/groups are handled in gnome-initial-setup for Image Mode [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-82252)
